data.body: 3 independent reviewer subagents reviewed the on-ramp docs (questions: what's still ambiguous about creating a passing plan; what's missing). Refining docs/writing-a-passing-plan.md on the 7 items ALL THREE independently surfaced (avoiding overfit to any single reviewer): (1) leaf-vs-container determination; (2) grounding citation format + how to list not-yet-existing files in the edit-set; (3) what stales an attestation; (4) review-plan-vs-check-ac/clarity-check gate relationship; (5) a worked minimum-viable passing plan example; (6) what a review-plan finding looks like + recovery; (7) per-type section applicability. Dropping items only 2/3 raised (--force consequences, project-configurability, exact heading matching).
